name: MaxLinear, Inc.
description: MaxLinear, Inc. is an American electronic hardware company founded in 2003 and headquartered in Carlsbad, California. The company specializes in providing highly integrated radio-frequency (RF), analog, and mixed-signal semiconductor products designed for broadband communications applications. MaxLinear serves a global market, offering advanced systems-on-chip solutions that enable high-performance connectivity across various industries. As a publicly traded entity, it continues to innovate in the semiconductor space, focusing on delivering efficient and scalable technology for modern communication infrastructures, including cable, satellite, and wireless networking systems.
